title: rhus toxicodendron var. negundo
intro: Rhus toxicodendron var. negundo, also known as the Himalayan poison ivy or poison sumac, is a type of plant that belongs to the Anacardiaceae family. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Rhus toxicodendron var. negundo include its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions such as eczema and dermatitis. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and roots are often used to make teas, tinctures, and poultices, which can be used to treat various health issues.
